parameters.jsCode:
const userId = $('Webhook: POST /dashboard/profile').first().json.body.user_id;
return [{ json: { user_id: userId } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.id          AS user_id,
  u.name        AS user_name,
  u.level       AS user_level,
  u.avatar_url  AS user_avatar,
  u.created_at  AS member_since,
  -- Stats: total messages
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.conversations c WHERE c.user_id = u.id)          AS total_messages,
  -- Stats: total corrections
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.corrections co WHERE co.user_id = u.id)          AS total_corrections,
  -- Stats: words mastered
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.user_vocabularies uv WHERE uv.user_id = u.id AND uv.is_mastered = true) AS words_mastered,
  -- Stats: total vocab collected
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.user_vocabularies uv WHERE uv.user_id = u.id)    AS total_vocabs,
  -- Stats: total sessions
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.sessions s WHERE s.user_id = u.id)               AS total_sessions
FROM public.users u
WHERE u.id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  uv.is_mastered,
  v.id           AS vocab_id,
  v.vocab_word   AS word,
  v.definition,
  v.part_of_speech AS type,
  v.level        AS vocab_level,
  uv.created_at  AS learned_at
FROM public.user_vocabularies uv
INNER JOIN public.vocabularies v ON v.id = uv.vocabulary_id
WHERE uv.user_id = '{{ $('Set: user_id').first().json.user_id }}'
ORDER BY uv.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: true, message: 'user_id is required', code: 400 }) }}
